service_name: Request for layout of IEC materials
description: University partners may request layout designs for IEC materials such as social media posts, tarpaulins, presentations, brochures, flyers, and related publications.
office_or_unit: ICO - Publications and Digital Communications (PuDCom) Unit
requirements: Proof of approved partnership with SLSU, such as signed MOA or approved request letter.
Completely filled out online Job Order form with layout specifications and related photo/video materials.
submission_timeline: Submit at least ten (10) working days before intended use.
If no concept is provided, additional time beyond the 10-day requirement may be necessary.
Requests for events scheduled within the same week are strongly discouraged and may be declined unless accompanied by an approved letter signed by the University President.
css_reminder: Accomplish the Client Satisfaction Survey after the service.

description: Partner agencies and sectors may request ICO documentation services for events through raw photo and video footage. This does not include AVP highlights.
office_or_unit: ICO - Content Development and Creative Services (CoDeCS) Unit
who_may_avail: Partner National Government Agencies and Private Sectors
requirements: Proof of approved partnership with SLSU, such as signed MOA or approved request letter.
Completely filled out online Job Order form.
submission_timeline: Requests for AVPs must be submitted at least ten (10) working days before the event or presentation date.
Requests involving shooting across multiple locations must be submitted at least twenty (20) working days before the event or presentation date.
Last-minute requests within the same week are discouraged and may be declined unless accompanied by an approved letter signed by the University President.
css_reminder: Accomplish the Client Satisfaction Survey after the service.

description: SLSU units may request in-house training implementation or ICO speakership for seminars and training.
office_or_unit: ICO - Public and Media Relations (PuMRel) Unit
requirements: Written request addressed to the University President through the ICO Head.
Training proposal and/or program draft.
submission_timeline: Requests are assessed by ICO.
Off-campus requests are forwarded to the University President for approval.
css_reminder: Accomplish the Client Satisfaction Survey after the service.

service_name: Request for layout of IEC materials
description: University units may request layout designs for IEC materials such as social media posts, tarpaulins, presentations, brochures, flyers, and related publications.
office_or_unit: ICO - Publications and Digital Communications (PuDCom) Unit
requirements: Completely filled out online Job Order form with layout specifications and related photo/video materials.
Complete reference details.
submission_timeline: Submit at least ten (10) working days before intended use.
If no concept is provided, additional time beyond the 10-day requirement may be necessary.
Incomplete submissions will result in automatic deferment.
Same-week requests are strongly discouraged and may be declined unless accompanied by an approved letter signed by the University President.
css_reminder: Accomplish the Client Satisfaction Survey after the service.

service_name: Request for article and/or report writing
description: University units may request ICO to prepare articles, reports, and related write-ups.
office_or_unit: ICO - Publications and Digital Communications (PuDCom) Unit
requirements: Completely filled out online Job Order form.
.docx file containing essential request details.
Google Drive link to additional information, if necessary.
Complete reference details.
submission_timeline: Articles must be submitted at least five (5) working days before the deadline.
Reports and technical papers require at least ten (10) working days.
Extensive technical writing exceeding five pages may need additional time beyond the 10-day requirement.
Incomplete submissions will be automatically deferred.
css_reminder: Accomplish the Client Satisfaction Survey after the service.

service_name: Request for posting and/or email blast
description: University units may request ICO to publish information through Facebook, website posting, or email blast.
office_or_unit: ICO - Public and Media Relations (PuMRel) Unit
requirements: Completely filled out online Job Order form.
For Facebook and website posting: Word file containing the caption and editable Canva link of the pubmat.
Names of the writer and layout artist, if applicable.
For email blast: Word file containing the body of the email and necessary attachments.
submission_timeline: For official templates for social media and website posts, contact ICO at reports@slsu.edu.ph.
css_reminder: Accomplish the Client Satisfaction Survey after the service.

description: University units may request ICO to produce audiovisual materials for documentation, reports, and promotional purposes.
office_or_unit: ICO - Content Development and Creative Services (CoDeCS) Unit
requirements: Completely filled out online Job Order form.
Google Drive link to comprehensive details.
Script, storyboard, or mood board if possible.
Available photos/video materials.
submission_timeline: Requests for AVPs must be submitted at least ten (10) working days before the event or presentation date.
Requests involving shooting across multiple locations must be submitted at least twenty (20) working days before the event or presentation date.
If no script or storyboard is provided, additional time beyond the 20-day requirement may be needed.
Last-minute same-week requests are discouraged and may be declined unless accompanied by an approved letter signed by the University President.
css_reminder: Accomplish the Client Satisfaction Survey after the service.

description: University units may request ICO to document events by capturing raw photo and video footage. This request does not include AVP highlights.
office_or_unit: ICO - Content Development and Creative Services (CoDeCS) Unit
requirements: Completely filled out online Job Order form.
submission_timeline: Requests for AVPs must be submitted at least ten (10) working days before the event or presentation date.
Requests involving shooting across multiple locations must be submitted at least twenty (20) working days before the event or presentation date.
Last-minute same-week requests are discouraged and may be declined unless accompanied by an approved letter signed by the University President.
css_reminder: Accomplish the Client Satisfaction Survey after the service.

service_name: Request review of layout and/or write-up
description: University units may request ICO to review the write-up and/or design layout of IEC materials such as programs, certificates, and tarpaulins.
office_or_unit: ICO - Public and Media Relations (PuMRel) Unit
requirements: Completely filled out online Job Order form with the editable link to the material.
submission_timeline: A minimum of five (5) working days is required for review.
Last-minute requests, particularly for events within the same week, are discouraged.
css_reminder: Accomplish the Client Satisfaction Survey after the service.
